hypotheses.statement: PINN achieves rel-L2 < 1e-3 with 16384 collocation points (Adam+L-BFGS)
L-BFGS reduces rel-L2 by ≥5× vs Adam-only
hypotheses.evidence: Requires a separate Adam-only checkpoint. Re-run: python pinn_run/run.py --no-lbfgs, then compare.

hypotheses.statement: Rel-L2 decreases monotonically across 256→1024→4096→16384 collocation pts
BC weight w_bc=10 reduces boundary residual vs w_bc=1
hypotheses.evidence: Run: python pinn_run/run.py --w-bc 1.0 and compare bc_mse_top.
